sentence: 总公司在上海，分公司在各地。
pinyin: Zǒng gōngsī zài Shànghǎi, fēn gōngsī zài gè dì.
english: The head office is in Shanghai, with branch offices everywhere.

meaning: 1. to look exactly like; 2. to be the spitting image of
sentence: 他穿上那件衣服活像个明星。
pinyin: Tā chuān shàng nà jiàn yīfu huóxiàng gè míngxīng.
english: He looks exactly like a celebrity when he puts on that outfit.

sentence: 生物课上我们学习了植物的生殖方式。
pinyin: Shēngwù kè shàng wǒmen xuéxí le zhíwù de shēngzhí fāngshì.
english: In biology class we learned about the reproduction methods of plants.

meaning: national security (abbr. for 國家安全|国家安全[guo2 jia1 an1 quan2]); national
sentence: 这个部门负责处理国安相关事务。
pinyin: Zhè ge bù mén fù zé chǔ lǐ guó ān xiāng guān shì wù.
english: This department is responsible for handling national security matters.

sentence: 现代农业越来越注重集约经营。
pinyin: Xiàn dài nóng yè yuè lái yuè zhù zhòng jí yuē jīng yíng.
english: Modern agriculture pays more and more attention to intensive management.
